prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild scene, Ren Starling in cream and mint robes and Ren Mistfell in a rolled-sleeve apron and brass tool belt; Ren Starling holds open his worn leather healer's satchel on a wooden workbench while Ren Mistfell carefully measures a section of leather for a custom vial holder, soft lamplight, cinematic focus, no text, no watermark.
